experiments.name: Sensor-Only LightGBM (Strategy A)
experiments.description: LightGBM trained on 260-dim sensor features (5 stats × 52 sensors). Optuna 50-trial hyperparameter optimization with 5-fold stratified CV.
experiments.notes: Perfect separation due to sensor NaN pattern (sensor_00 is NaN for RECOVERING, finite for NORMAL).

experiments.name: Joint Sensor+Image LightGBM (Strategy B)
experiments.description: LightGBM on concatenated [260 sensor + 512 CLIP] = 772-dim features. Same Optuna tuning.
experiments.notes: Joint features provide redundant separation. Top features remain sensor-based.

experiments.name: Hybrid Fusion — TransformerCrossModal + Gated (Strategy C, Production)
experiments.description: Trained TransformerCrossModalFusion (d_model=256, 2 layers, 4 heads) blended with GatedFusion. Adaptive weight based on modality count.
experiments.notes: Selected as production system for graceful degradation and extensibility despite no accuracy advantage on current data.

experiments.name: CLIP Linear Probe (fine-tuning experiment)
experiments.description: Freeze all CLIP layers, train a linear classification head on 512-dim CLIP embeddings.
experiments.notes: No benefit over frozen CLIP zero-shot — images already perfectly separated.

experiments.name: CLIP Fine-Tune Last 2 Blocks
experiments.description: Fine-tune last 2 transformer blocks of CLIP ViT-B/32 on pump images.
experiments.model: CLIP ViT-B/32 (last 2 blocks unfrozen) + linear head
experiments.notes: No accuracy improvement. Risk of overfitting on 241 images. NOT recommended.

experiments.name: TransformerCrossModalFusion — Random Init (no training)
experiments.description: Use the transformer fusion module without any training. Weights are randomly initialized.
experiments.notes: Confirms training is essential — untrained transformer outputs are random noise.

experiments.name: Image-Only (CLIP zero-shot)
experiments.description: Use only CLIP image encoder with zero-shot fault/normal prompt matching. No sensor data.
experiments.model: CLIP ViT-B/32 zero-shot (9 fault + 3 normal prompts)
experiments.notes: Strong but not perfect. Small number of corroded images misclassified as normal.

experiments.name: Robustness: 50% Sensor NaN (sensor-only)
experiments.description: Randomly set 50% of sensor values to NaN. Evaluates robustness of sensor-only model.
experiments.notes: Graceful degradation — NaN handling in extract_features() substitutes zeros.

experiments.name: Robustness: 50% Sensor NaN (hybrid fusion)
experiments.description: Same NaN perturbation with full hybrid fusion. Image modality compensates.
experiments.notes: Hybrid outperforms sensor-only under degradation — image modality compensates.

experiments.name: Robustness: Gaussian Noise σ=0.5 on Sensors
experiments.description: Add Gaussian noise (σ=0.5) to all sensor values.
experiments.notes: Moderate degradation — noise disrupts the NaN-pattern feature.

experiments.name: Robustness: Gaussian Noise σ=0.5 (hybrid fusion)
experiments.description: Same noise perturbation with full hybrid fusion.
experiments.notes: Hybrid adds +0.0042 AUC over sensor-only under noise.

experiments.name: Caching Disabled (accuracy check)
experiments.description: Disable both prediction cache (SensorBaselineModel._cache) and response cache (orchestrator._resp_cache).
experiments.notes: No accuracy impact — caching is a pure latency optimization.

latency_profiling.description: Per-function profiling of sensor-only predict hot path (1000 iterations, single-threaded)
